dailyNews.title: 'Like a 6-year-old': Emmy Award-winning host blasts Trump’s word games over Iran 'war'
dailyNews.description: Since the conflict began in late February, when Israel and the US carried out joint military operations on Iran, Trump has refrained from using the word ‘war’.

dailyNews.title: MCX Gold Rate Touches Rs 1.5 Lakh, Silver Jumps 2% Amid Fears Of Iran War Escalation
dailyNews.description: The rally in domestic bullion mirrored gains in international markets. US spot gold was trading at $4,561.83 per ounce, up 1.53%.

dailyNews.title: Middle East conflict: Spain closes airspace to US planes involved in Iran strikes; minister reiterates anti-war stance
dailyNews.description: Spain has announced the closure of its airspace to US military planes that have been involved in attacking Iran, a move that aims to further reiterate Madrid's anti-war stance.

dailyNews.title: Trump wants to ‘take Iran’s oil’: Can he, and what would that mean?
dailyNews.description: Trump said US forces could seize Iran's oil export hub at Kharg Island as the war enters its second month.

dailyNews.title: Kenya’s former New York marathon champion Korir gets five-year doping ban
dailyNews.description: Korir tested positive for a drug that stimulates red blood cell production during out-of-competition tests.

dailyNews.title: War on Iran disrupts Asia’s used-car exports to the Middle East
dailyNews.description: The US-Israel war on Iran has lead to disruptions in Asia’s used-car exporting industry.

dailyNews.title: Spain closes airspace to US planes involved in war on Iran
dailyNews.description: The announcement comes after Madrid refused to let Washington use jointly operated military bases for the war on Iran.

dailyNews.title: Why have the US and Israel bombed more than 75 Iranian police facilities?
dailyNews.description: An Al Jazeera investigation finds internal security facilities in populated areas have been heavily targeted.

dailyNews.title: Iran’s Foreign Ministry denies claims of US-Iran negotiations
dailyNews.description: Iran’s foreign ministry denied claims of negotiations with the US.

dailyNews.title: Spain closes airspace to US aircraft involved in Iran war
dailyNews.description: It follows a decision by the Spanish government to deny the US use of the two jointly run military bases in Andalusia.

dailyNews.title: Trump ‘pretty sure’ of Iran deal, but can Pakistan-led efforts end the war?
dailyNews.description: Pakistan, Saudi Arabia, Turkiye and Egypt set up a team for backchannel talks with the US and Iran.

dailyNews.title: NDA, Opposition spar in LS over efforts to free country of Maoism
dailyNews.description: While Shiv Sena pointed out that the red corridor has shrunk significantly due to the policies of the NDA govt and the previous UPA regime was helpless, the Congress hit back saying it was the UPA that launched Operation Green Hunt and had created the Commando Battalion for Resolute Action (CoBRA) to deal with Maoist threat; Union Home Minister Amit Shah had announced that Maoist menace would be completely eliminated by March 31, 2026

dailyNews.title: Chicago’s Brandon Johnson blasts 'assaults against immigrants' as slain Sheridan Gorman is laid to rest
dailyNews.description: Mayor Brandon Johnson defended immigrant policies at a protest as Sheridan Gorman's family laid her to rest, vowing to fight for justice in New York.

dailyNews.title: 'Project Hail Mary' author Andy Weir slams modern 'Star Trek' shows as 's---'
dailyNews.description: "Project Hail Mary" author Andy Weir called modern "Star Trek" shows "s---" and revealed Paramount once rejected his pitch for a new "Star Trek" series.

dailyNews.title: New AI coalition targets Washington, Big Tech as group warns child safety risks outpacing safeguards
dailyNews.description: The Alliance for a Better Future launches with an eight-figure budget to push AI regulation, saying policymakers must prioritize kids and workers over Big Tech.

dailyNews.title: Israel Defense Forces suspends battalion from deployment over ‘inappropriate’ incident with CNN crew
dailyNews.description: The Israel Defense Force (IDF) suspended an entire battalion from West Bank operations on Monday after soldiers allegedly assaulted a CNN crew.

dailyNews.title: Iran's internet blackout hiding strike damage and suppressing dissent, Israeli officials say
dailyNews.description: Israeli officials say Iran's internet blackout is hiding war damage, jamming Starlink, and stopping civilians from organizing amid mounting regime pressure.

dailyNews.title: Tiger Woods faces one big question after DUI arrest in Florida, legal expert says
dailyNews.description: Donna Rotunno, a legal expert and Fox News podcast host, talked to Fox News Digital about the situation Tiger Woods is facing after his arrest in Florida.

dailyNews.title: Federal election complaint alleges AOC misused campaign funds for psychiatrist services
dailyNews.description: A watchdog group alleges Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez misused nearly $19,000 in campaign funds to pay a psychiatrist, filing a federal FEC complaint.

dailyNews.title: Mike Rowe unleashes on Jimmy Kimmel's latest 'tone-deaf' takedown targeting everyday Americans
dailyNews.description: Mike Rowe called out Jimmy Kimmel for his “tone deaf" comments mocking new DHS Secretary Markwayne Mullin for being a former plumber, admitting he is a “tad butt hurt" by the dig.

topStories.title: Marco Rubio says President Trump prefers diplomatic solution to war on Iran
topStories.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio said that President Donald Trump still prefers a diplomatic outcome for war on Iran.

topStories.title: Karoline Leavitt blasts NYT ballroom coverage, calls out critics who 'never built anything'
topStories.description: Karoline Leavitt blasted The New York Times over an article about the White House ballroom plans, saying the project costs taxpayers nothing and is long overdue.

topStories.title: Trump Claims ‘Regime Change’ in Iran Is Already Complete
topStories.description: President Trump suggested that Iran’s current leaders were “much more reasonable” as he sought to show progress in his war aims. Iran’s power structure appears firmly in control despite a month of U.S.-Israeli attacks.

topStories.title: War Pushes Gas Prices Near $4 a Gallon, and Anti-Trump Protesters Rally Nationwide
topStories.description: Plus, a surge of Catholic converts in the United States.

topStories.title: Private-Credit Wobbles Could Prove Perilous for Trump
topStories.description: The Trump administration is poised to broaden access to risky investments that are showing signs of strain.

topStories.title: New Political Group to Push Trump’s A.I. Agenda in Midterms
topStories.description: The group, Innovation Council Action, says it plans to spend at least $100 million. It will be led by a former administration official.

topStories.title: Markwayne Mullin Takes Over DHS With Less Flash but Same Mission
topStories.description: Markwayne Mullin, the incoming D.H.S. secretary, faces a difficult balance: a public reset of the agency while delivering on President Trump’s deportation agenda.

topStories.title: Texas Border Wall Plan in Big Bend Draws Opposition From Republicans and Democrats
topStories.description: Plans for a wall in Big Bend National Park prompted public protests and behind-the-scenes lobbying to sway the Trump administration to stop.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Birthright Citizenship Order at Supreme Court Splits Conservative Scholars
dailyNews.description: Before President Trump’s order to limit birthright citizenship, there was widespread agreement that the 14th Amendment guaranteed citizenship for U.S.-born babies.

dailyNews.title: Oil prices soar as Trump threatens to invade Iran, seize its resources
dailyNews.description: Energy markets remain volatile as Trump threatens Iran with an invasion to seize its oil while also suggesting a deal could soon end the war.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens to obliterate Iranian energy sites if deal isn't reached shortly
dailyNews.description: President Trump threatened on social media to obliterate Iranian energy sites if "a deal is not shortly reached." Ret. Col. Mark Cancian, a senior adviser at the Center for Strategic and International Studies, joins with more.

dailyNews.title: Key details on Iran war as Trump doesn't deny plans to put troops on the ground
dailyNews.description: President Trump is not ruling out plans to put troops on the ground in Iran despite efforts to find a diplomatic off-ramp. CBS News' Elizabeth Palmer and Weijia Jiang report.

dailyNews.title: Special Operations Forces, Marines and Army troops now in Middle East, sources say
dailyNews.description: The forces give Trump military options in Iran, including operations that could target opening the Strait of Hormuz, take oil from Kharg Island or seize Iran's stockpile of enriched uranium, sources said.

dailyNews.title: Face the Nation: Warner, Arrington, Gordon
dailyNews.description: Missed the second half of the show? The latest on the Trump administration's foreign policy and sharing attack plans over an app.

dailyNews.title: Republican, Democratic strategists on Trump's approval rating, reactions to Iran war
dailyNews.description: Americans are reacting to the Iran war and are rating President Trump's performance ahead of the 2026 midterms. Political strategists Carrie Sheffield and Hyma Moore have more.

dailyNews.title: President Trump claims 'regime change' has happened in Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump spoke to reporters on Air Force One and claimed that "regime change" has happened in Iran since the conflict began and that it was imperative.

dailyNews.title: More Troops Arrive in Middle East as Trump Hails Iran Negotiations
dailyNews.description: As thousands more American troops arrive in the Middle East to join a widening war, President Donald Trump says Iran is softening its weekslong blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, after it allowed 20 boats through the oil route. It comes as the Washington Post reports that the Pentagon is preparing for weeks of ground operations in Iran, short of a full-scale invasion. NBC’s Matt Bradley reports for TODAY.

dailyNews.title: TSA Pay to Resume As Airport Security Bottleneck Persists
dailyNews.description: Travelers across the country are still dealing with delays at airport security days after President Donald Trump signed an executive order approving TSA officers’ back pay. The Department of Homeland Security says the officers could start getting paychecks as soon as Monday or Tuesday. NBC’s Priscilla Thompson reports for TODAY.

dailyNews.title: Democrats push Trump admin to tackle insider trading in booming prediction markets
dailyNews.description: The letter to the CFTC and Office of Government Ethics (OGE) comes after weeks of increasing scrutiny on potential insider trading by government employees.

dailyNews.title: U.S. troops amass as Trump says Iran softened blockcade
dailyNews.description: U.S. troops amass as Trump says Iran softened blockcade
